name: Heidelberg Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Mix together all of the ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Transfer the mixture into an ungreased loaf pan, measuring 9 X 5 X 3 inches.
4. Bake uncovered for 1 to 1 1/4 hours.
5. Allow the meatloaf to rest for 5 to 10 minutes before slicing.
6. Serve on a heated platter.
